creator: ltning-pfsense@anduin.net
text:
When adding an IP address to an existing CARP interface using ifconfig...alias, traffic passing through the interface becomes erratic and slow, and dmesg shows many "carpX: incorrect hash" messages.

See
 http://unix.derkeiler.com/Mailing-Lists/FreeBSD/net/2008-03/msg00146.html
for a detailed explanation of the same problem.

How-To-Repeat: ifconfig carpX x.x.x.x/yy alias
